name: Amazon Web Services, Inc.
lede: AWS runs two centers across two Indian cities. Hyderabad and Mumbai, covering IT, built over ten years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AWS office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AWS GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AWS runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Mumbai), covering IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: AWS's India footprint covers Hyderabad and Mumbai, spanning IT. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, Procurement and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all seven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does AWS operate in India?
faq.a: AWS operates 2 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AWS have centers in?
faq.a: AWS's India footprint includes Hyderabad and 1 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does AWS run in India?
faq.a: AWS runs IT centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AWS's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for AWS's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AWS's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at AWS's India centers, across IT and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
